audit-loop.summary: Self-driving plan-audit-fix loop with adaptive learning.

plan-backend.summary: Backend architecture planning with engineering principles. Use when the user asks to plan,

ship.summary: Sync all project documentation, optionally update a plan, then commit and push to git.

persona-test.summary: Persona-driven exploratory browser testing against a live URL. Plan→Act→Reflect loop, P0–P3 findings with confidence scoring, qualitative debrief, Supabase session memory, cross-references audit-loop findings. list/add sub-commands for per-app persona registry.
